title: Assistant Store Manager - Croma Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Croma Digital Technologies - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Croma Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Croma Digital Technologies:
Croma Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma Digital Technologies!
